text:
Created attachment 180947
www/py27-selenium-3.3.1_1.diff

Updated www/py-selenium to 3.3.1 [1]. Removed LICENSE_FILE= since the license file is no longer included in the tarball. Updated patch-setup.py so it applies cleanly.

[1] https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SeleniumHQ/selenium/master/py/CHANGES

portlint: OK (looks fine.)
testport: OK (poudriere: 103i386, 103amd64)
